content.en:
"Lord of the Moon Realm, will I go directly to the Five Thousand Territory next, or will I go somewhere else?"

Ye Tian consulted with the Lord of the Dressing Moon Realm, after all, the other party was the most familiar with the situation here.

The Moon Realm Lord was silent for a while, and then said, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, I don't recommend that you go to the Five Thousand Territory now, although the Five Thousand Territory is the most powerful one of the thousand extra-dimensional territories, the other extra-dimensional territories are also very powerful, and there are a lot of resources. The point is that almost all of the 5000 Territory is occupied by those forces, and the good resources are also monopolized by them, and you can hardly do it if you want to get a great opportunity in the 5000 Territory in the Second Realm Extradimensional Realm. Even if you are lucky enough to get a big opportunity, you will be targeted. "

"Where should I go?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Go to the territory of five thousand three hundred and thirty-three, this territory is very good, there are about a dozen third realms, the point is that this extradimensional territory has a good place, which will help you improve the extradimensional rules. "

The Moon Realm Lord proposed.

"Okay, then go to the territory of 5333!"

Ye Tian didn't think about it at all, and directly decided to go to the territory of 175333.

Subsequently.

He bought a flight to the territory of 5333, and he took a flight under the superdimensional force, the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce.

The Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce is one of the overlords of the Five Thousand Realms, with more than ten Fourth Realms, but most of the Fourth Realms have gone to the wider world, but there are still five Fourth Realms for a long time.

The scale of such strength far exceeds that of Blazing Sun Palace.

Moreover, the Jiucai Chamber of Commerce has a higher background, which makes other forces almost dare not offend the Jiucai Chamber of Commerce.

The Jialan Chamber of Commerce in the 6,000th Territory is backed by the Jiucai Chamber of Commerce, which is strictly the third realm of the Jiucai Chamber of Commerce.

Maybe the other extra-dimensional realms of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce don't know what the Jialan Chamber of Commerce is, and the background of this relationship is not very deep, which is also the reason why the Jialan Chamber of Commerce is not as good as the Liudu Boundary Mountain, after all, they can't rely on that third realm to get too many benefits.

Soon.

Ye Tian entered the site of the Nine Colored Chamber of Commerce in the Yunlan Realm, and entered the Three Hundred Nine Colored Treasure Ship of the Nine Colored Chamber of Commerce, this Nine Colored Treasure Ship is not ordinary, its quality has reached the high level of super dimensional Dao soldiers, and there is also a third realm sitting in the town.

It can be said that as long as you don't encounter the fourth realm and the third realm of demons, you can't help it.

Moreover, the Nine Colored Treasure Boat is moving along a relatively safe route, and the possibility of encountering danger is very low, even if there is a little danger, the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce can solve it.

......

On this Nine Colored Treasure Ship, Ye Tian found that his will was suppressed, which was the effect of the Super Dimensional Formation on the Nine Colored Treasure Ship.

The void inside the Nine Colored Treasure Ship is very large, and every passenger has an independent space, Ye Tian's cultivation in the independent space is not affected, and the will can sense some situations in the outside world through the formation here.

Soon.

All the passengers arrived, and the Nine Colored Treasure Ship set off on time and left the Yunlan Realm.

Along the way, the Nine Colored Treasure Ship was moving at an extremely fast speed, and some weak extradimensional creatures did not dare to approach at all.

Airplanes!

The boundary extradimensional barrier of the 5991 territory was torn apart, and the Nine Colored Treasure Ship continued to shuttle forward.

"Such a powerful nine-colored treasure ship, although the boundary super-dimensional barrier here does not need the power of the third realm to break through, but only the attack power of the top second realm can be torn apart, and the nine-colored treasure ship is too easy to break through the boundary super-dimensional barrier!"

He observed for a while, witnessing the Nine Colored Treasure Ships pass through one extradimensional realm after another.

But suddenly.

The Nine Colored Treasure Ship was affected by a force, and dense extradimensional creatures surrounded the area.

"It's an extradimensional creature - the Tooth Realm Worm!"

"This extradimensional creature is so annoying, there are too many of them, and it's hard to strangle them!"

"With so many second realm fangs and even third realm fangs insects, can this nine-colored treasure ship withstand it?"

The will of the second realm is exchanged, and many of the second realm are a little panicked.

Although the Nine Colored Treasure Ship rarely has an accident, once something happens, then almost all of them have to be wiped out!

"Tooth Worm!"

The Lords of the Moon Realm trembled, "Why are you so unlucky!"

"Lord of the Moon Realm, what is the origin of the toothworm?" Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Moon Realm said solemnly: "The Tooth Realm Worm is one of the great evils here, this extradimensional creature race is all over many extradimensional territories, and there are too many of them, what is terrifying about them is not the power of the extradimensional bloodline, nor the talent, but the terrifying ability to reproduce. Under normal circumstances, the ability of extradimensional beings to reproduce is very low, and it is difficult to give birth to offspring. But the fangs are different, they devour the energy of flesh and blood, and they can give birth to offspring. As long as a tusk worm has enough flesh and blood energy, it can reproduce all the time, and it can reproduce hundreds of offspring at a time. And as long as there is no problem with the bloodline, every offspring can grow to the half-step superdimensional realm, and those with excellent bloodlines can grow to the first realm. With the terrifying number of this extradimensional biological race, there are naturally many second and third realms born. "

"It is said that it is known that the third realm of the Worm Realm Insect Clan is at least thousands, and there are even three fourth-headed realms. The terrifying thing is that the number of the second realm and the first realm is completely cannon fodder, and a batch of losses can be cultivated in a short period of time. And even forces like the 173 Blazing Sun Palace and the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce can't afford to lose a lot of extradimensional realms, but they can, and no force dares to fight a war of attrition with the Worm Clan of the Tooth Realm. "

When Ye Tian heard this, he was also shocked.

The Worm Clan of the Tooth Realm is too perverted, if this is not restricted, wouldn't they have to give birth to more third or even fourth realms.

If such a race were born on the other side of the 6,000th Territory, it would be enough to destroy all the living beings there!

"I hope that the Nine Colored Chamber of Commerce has hole cards, otherwise this Nine Colored Treasure Ship alone will not be able to stop these Tooth Realm Worms, there are at least six Tooth Realm Worms of the Third Realm here!"

The Lord of the Moon Realm doesn't want to die, she is not Ye Tian, Ye Tian's doppelganger will fall if she falls, if she falls, it will really fall!

"Don't panic!"

A member of the Second Realm of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce shouted, "Our Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce has a way to avoid the Tooth Realm insects here. "

As soon as the words fell, a scroll appeared on the Nine Colored Treasure Ship, and after this scroll was unfolded, it emitted a wisp of aura, which directly made these fanged realm insects retreat in fright.

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

The Lord of the Moon Realm was surprised: "The third realm guarded on this Nine Colored Treasure Ship actually has a wisp of breath in its hand that seals the Glazed Realm Dragon!"
